summary: The user is searching for a 1950s-era Zeiss Planar lens to complete their vintage camera collection and is exploring various online marketplaces, local camera shops, and photography schools for leads. They also mentioned their interest in collecting vinyl records and found a copy of "Sgt. Pepper's Lonely Hearts Club Band" for $5 at a garage sale.
facts: The user is looking for a 1950s-era Zeiss Planar lens to complete their vintage camera collection. The user found a near-mint condition copy of "Sgt. Pepper's Lonely Hearts Club Band" for $5 at a garage sale last month. The user plans to post about their search for the lens on local online classifieds and social media groups. The user intends to email the photography department at the local college to ask if they know of anyone selling a 1950s-era Zeiss Planar lens. The user is considering reaching out to local photography schools or colleges to see if any students or professors might know of someone selling the lens. The user is also checking record stores in town that sell vintage cameras and photography equipment for leads on the lens.
